title: fabricia longifolia
intro: Fabricia longifolia, also known as African horned cucumber, is a plant species in the family Cucurbitaceae. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Fabricia longifolia can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties.
